overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking from a dark underpass through a futuristic sunlit city environment with palm trees, elevated highways, and modern glass skyscrapers. The camera moves steadily along an elevated walkway, transitioning from shadow to bright daylight while approaching an urban complex.

agents.ego_description: walking past a wrecked red car under a dark concrete overpass

entered.detail: burned-out red sedan with missing doors and damaged frame
large cylindrical support column for the overpass
metal security fencing along the left side
uneven dirt and gravel surface with patches of grass

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dark, enclosed underpass beneath a highway. A wrecked red car sits on the right side while the camera moves forward over dirt ground. The space is dimly lit with concrete pillars supporting the overhead structure.

events.description: exits shadow of overpass into bright direct sunlight
transitions from enclosed underpass to open elevated walkway

agents.ego_description: walking up a concrete ramp while emerging from the dark underpass into bright sunlight

entered.detail: sloped concrete walkway leading up from the underpass
elevated highway structure visible ahead against the sky
tall modern buildings with glass facades in the distance
tall palm trees lining the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a concrete ramp, transitioning dramatically from the dark underpass to bright daylight. The scene opens up to reveal a wide elevated walkway with futuristic skyscrapers visible in the distance and palm trees lining the path ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with city views

events.description: slight turn to the right while walking along the path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wide elevated walkway with metal railings on the left

entered.detail: large industrial structure with smokestacks emitting white smoke
staircase leading down to lower level on the left side

segments.scene_description: Walking along the open elevated walkway with clear blue skies above. The industrial building with smokestacks is visible on the right, while palm trees line the left side. The highway overpass ahead grows larger as the camera approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: palm-lined walkway with modern glass architecture

events.description: camera pans right to view the glass buildings and construction cranes

agents.ego_description: walking past dense palm trees while observing the futuristic cityscape and modern architecture

entered.detail: tall contemporary building with reflective glass facade
crane structures atop the buildings indicating ongoing construction

segments.scene_description: The walkway continues with palm trees now prominent on the left side. Modern glass buildings with construction cranes rise on the right. The camera briefly turns to observe the architecture while maintaining forward progress toward the highway overpass.

events.description: pedestrians appear walking ahead on the path
approaching the covered area under the elevated highway structure

agents.ego_description: approaching a group of pedestrians near the overpass structure

notable_agents.action: person in brown trench coat walking toward camera

entered.detail: large orange advertising billboard mounted on structure
massive concrete and steel elevated highway interchange
staircase with metal railings leading down to lower plaza

segments.scene_description: Approaching the final section of the walkway, pedestrians become visible ahead including a person in a brown coat. An orange billboard stands out on the left while the massive overpass structure dominates the view ahead. Metal stairs lead down to a lower level as the camera nears the covered area under the highway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, enclosed underpass into a bright, futuristic cityscape. It begins in the shadows beneath a highway, moving past a wrecked red car and concrete pillars over dirt ground. As the camera ascends a concrete ramp, the scene transitions dramatically from darkness into brilliant daylight, opening onto a wide elevated walkway lined with palm trees and distant skyscrapers under a clear blue sky. The path then expands past an industrial building with smokestacks and modern glass towers topped with construction cranes, while the camera briefly pans to observe the architecture. Finally, the view shifts toward a massive highway overpass and an orange billboard, passing pedestrians and metal stairs as the camera approaches a covered area.
